source.description: Planned six-panel generated raster process sheet for the July 11, 2026 current lesson.
source.notes: One low beach sandcastle stays centered at the same three-quarter view on warm sketchbook paper.

process_strategy: The sheet builds the shoreline, central tower, side turrets, brick seams, doorway, shell flag, and pale sand-and-blue accents before the final panel only strengthens existing graphite lines and tone.

final_elements.name: shoreline guide
final_elements.description: A shallow curved ground line under the castle.

final_elements.name: central tower block
final_elements.description: A short square central tower with a slightly tapered perspective.

final_elements.name: two side turrets
final_elements.description: Rounded sand turrets beside the central tower.

final_elements.name: castle crenellations
final_elements.description: Simple square notches along each tower top.

final_elements.name: arched doorway and brick seams
final_elements.description: A small arched door with a few horizontal sand-block marks.

final_elements.name: shell flag and sand marks
final_elements.description: A tiny shell-topped flag and a few established sand texture strokes.

final_elements.name: pale sand and water accents
final_elements.description: Light ochre sand tone and pale blue shoreline accents.

frames.visible_job: Sketches the shallow shoreline guide and the central tower block.
Adds the two side turrets while keeping the central tower guide visible.
Shapes simple crenellations on the already placed towers.
Adds the doorway, brick seams, shell flag, and a few sand marks to established shapes.
Adds restrained ochre sand tone and pale blue water accents to the established castle and shore.

final_step.visible_job: Only deepens the existing tower edges, crenellations, doorway, shell flag, sand texture, and already present pale color accents.

rejection_checks: No tower, turret, doorway, flag, shoreline, texture, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
Each panel must keep the same low sandcastle pose, crop, scale, and paper texture.
The finish must remain a handmade pencil sketch rather than polished beach illustration.
